title: D.R. Harris Sandalwood Shaving Beech Bowl
description: D.R. Harris Sandalwood Shaving Soap In Beech Bowl is a traditional triple-milled shaving soap designed to create a rich, creamy lather for a smooth and comfortable wet shave. Made to the fine standards associated with D.R. Harris, this solid white shaving soap is fragranced with Sandalwood, a classic gentleman’s scent with warm, exotic and spicy notes. The fragrance includes notes of eucalyptus, bergamot, camphor, clove and vetiver, creating a refined shaving experience with a traditional character. The triple-milled soap produces a dense, protective lather when used with a shaving brush, helping to soften the beard and support comfortable razor glide. It is also highly economical, with each soap lasting for several months with regular use. Presented in a hand-turned beech wood bowl, it adds a classic feature to the bathroom while providing a practical home for the soap. Refill soaps are available, and the treated wooden bowl is designed to last for many years, developing its own character over time. For the matching bowl, see D.R. Harris Sandalwood Shaving Cream Tube 75g and D.R. Harris Sandalwood Shaving Mahogany Bowl. Key Features: Triple-Milled Shaving Soap: Creates a rich, creamy and long-lasting lather. Sandalwood Fragrance: Classic gentleman’s scent with warm, spicy and aromatic notes. Beech Wood Bowl: Hand-turned wooden bowl with a traditional bathroom look. Economical Use: Each soap can last for several months with regular shaving. Refillable Design: Compatible refill soaps are available separately. Brush-Lathering Formula: Designed for use with a shaving brush. Specifications: Product Type: Shaving soap in wooden bowl Fragrance: Sandalwood Fragrance Notes: Eucalyptus, bergamot, camphor, clove and vetiver Soap Type: Solid triple-milled shaving soap Bowl Material: Beech wood Key Ingredients: Sodium tallowate, glycerin and fragrance Use: Wet the beard with warm water, load a wet shaving brush with soap, lather in a bowl or directly on the face, then shave as normal Suitable For: Traditional wet shaving Refills Available: Yes

title: Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0 - Grey - Aggressive +++
description: The Henson AL13 Aggressive in Grey is the most efficient razor in the AL13 range. With a 0.98 mm blade gap and increased blade exposure, this variant is designed for experienced wet shavers with coarse or dense beard growth who want maximum cutting efficiency in fewer passes. This Henson razor is manufactured in Canada from aircraft-grade aluminium, CNC-machined to tolerances of +/- 0.00025 inches. The head design supports the blade close to the cutting edge, reducing flex and chatter. The aggressive geometry means more blade is exposed to the skin, requiring good technique and a light touch. At just 37g, the Henson AL13 remains lightweight despite its aggressive configuration. The grey anodised finish provides corrosion resistance and a clean, understated appearance. Unlike the standard AL13 which offers Mild and Medium options, the Grey Aggressive is a single-configuration razor for those who know they need more blade exposure. This is not a beginner razor. It suits those already comfortable with double edge safety razors who find Mild or Medium variants too gentle for their beard type. Who Is The Aggressive For Coarse or dense beard growth: Those who find standard razors require too many passes to achieve a close shave. Experienced wet shavers: Users familiar with blade angle and pressure control who want greater efficiency. Less frequent shavers: Those who shave every few days and need to cut through longer stubble. If you are new to safety razors or have sensitive skin, consider the standard AL13 in Mild or Medium instead. For compatible blades, see Henson RK Shaving Stainless DE Razor Blades - 100 Pack or Henson RK Blades Pack of 5. title: Henson Ti22 Titanium Safety Razor - Mild Aggression
description: The Henson Ti22 is a titanium safety razor built from Grade 5 Titanium, the same alloy used in aerospace and medical applications. This material is stronger than steel yet lighter, offering exceptional durability without adding unnecessary weight. The bare titanium finish requires no coating and will not wear or fade over time. At 63g, the Ti22 titanium razor is heavier than the aluminium AL13 (37g), providing additional feedback during shaving. This weight encourages controlled, deliberate strokes while the precision-machined head maintains consistent blade alignment. CNC-machined to tolerances of +/- 0.00025 inches, the geometry ensures the blade sits at the correct angle without adjustment. The Henson Ti22 is manufactured in Canada and represents the top of the Henson range. For those seeking a double edge safety razor built from premium materials with no compromise on engineering, this is the flagship option. Mild, Medium Or Aggressive: Which To Choose Mild (0.68 mm / 0.027" blade gap): Best for those new to safety razors, daily shavers with lighter growth, or anyone with sensitive skin. Offers a gentler introduction with minimal blade exposure. Medium (0.84 mm / 0.033" blade gap): The recommended choice for most users. Suited to regular to coarse beard growth and provides efficient, comfortable shaving. If unsure, start here. Aggressive (0.99 mm / 0.039" blade gap): Designed for experienced wet shavers with coarse or dense growth. Maximum blade exposure for efficient cutting in fewer passes. All three deliver a close shave. The difference lies in blade exposure and efficiency. For related Henson Shaving options, compare Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0 - Grey - Aggressive +++ with Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0 - Aircraft Aluminium, or browse the Henson Shaving collection. title: Martin De Candre Absinthe Shaving Soap - 200g
description: Martin De Candre Absinthe Shaving Soap is a traditional French shaving soap created to mark the brand’s 500th anniversary. description: The Simpsons Milk Churn Shaving Brush is a distinctive and historically rooted design, inspired by the traditional milk churns once common throughout Somerset, where Simpson originally established its workshop. Finished with the iconic front label stating Hand Made in Great Britain, this brush embodies the character and craftsmanship of traditional British shaving. Hand-turned in a faux ivory handle, the Polo series is recognised for its extended handle length, offering excellent reach, balance, and control while lathering.
